chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1072 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge Applications in disposed of case 1. For orders on CMA No.4242/2023 2. For hearing of CMA No.4243/2023 27-09-2023 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for Contemnors Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the alleged contemnors undertakes that if the flood water is standing as alleged, the efforts shall be made to drain it. Accordingly, in view of above statement, contempt application is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
